description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular layout with a prominent dark gable roof and a lighter exterior facade. The front area includes a fenced yard with a central swimming pool, surrounded by a patio with outdoor furniture and a covered carport or garage on one side. Large windows line the main living area, providing ample natural light and a view of the backyard amenities. The structure is set on a raised platform, with a driveway leading to the carport and a small green lawn adjacent to the pool. The rear and side elevations are more solid, with fewer windows and a simple, clean finish. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a streamlined, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern bungalow with a dark gable roof, large windows, a central swimming pool, and a covered carport, set within a fenced yard and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, swimming pool, patio, and carport.
description_view_1: Top-down angle highlighting the roof, pool, and the open backyard layout.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and a solid wall, emphasizing the building's depth and roof structure.
description_view_3: Side view dominated by the long, dark roof and plain exterior wall, with the yard and pool partially visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
